datasets.name: mecdm_alloydb
datasets.description: MECDM unified database containing maternal and child health data, geographic hierarchies, infrastructure locations, and reference datasets for Meghalaya's Early Childhood Development Mission.

domains.name: geographic
domains.description: Administrative boundaries and geographic hierarchies from Census 2011 and LGD

domains.name: master_reference
domains.description: Canonical reference tables linking LGD codes across systems

domains.name: infrastructure
domains.description: Health facilities and Anganwadi centres with GPS coordinates

domains.name: health_data
domains.description: Core maternal and child health tracking data

domains.name: mother_app
domains.description: Curated Mother App dataset — registration, ANC visits 1–4, delivery outcomes, and per-child results. Replaces legacy mother_journeys + raw_pregnancy_records. mothers is one row per pregnancy; mother_anc_visits_flat and mother_children are long-form children joined via composite (mother_id, pregnancy_number) FK.

domains.name: raw_records
domains.description: Unprocessed Meghealth API responses preserved for audit

domains.name: reference
domains.description: NFHS indicators, educational content, and research resources
